commands.repair_reason: The remaining blocker is contributor-provided real behavior proof and maintainer review of the process-exit guard, not a concrete automated repair task.; Cleared: The diff only changes local TUI process-exit handling and focused tests; I found no dependency, CI, credential, permission, or supply-chain regression. (sha=92dfa38c758e52eb02f1bc50599db548666eb49c)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an internal CLI-only TUI option that schedules a bounded post-return process exit guard and adds regression coverage for CLI wiring and `/exit` command handling.

Reproducibility: no. we do not have a high-confidence live reproduction in this review. Source inspection shows current main has shutdown guarding before `runTui` returns but no standalone CLI post-return process guard, which matches the reported lingering-child failure mode.
commands.review_followup: The remaining blocker is contributor-provided real behavior proof and maintainer review of the process-exit guard, not a concrete automated repair task.

target.title: fix(tui): bound standalone exit
target.body:
## Summary
- Adds a standalone TUI post-return exit guard so `/exit` cannot leave an onboarding-launched `openclaw-tui` child alive after the visible UI stops.
- Enables the guard only for the CLI TUI command and adds regression coverage for both the `/exit` command path and the CLI option wiring.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/tui/tui.test.ts src/tui/tui-command-handlers.test.ts src/cli/program.smoke.test.ts src/tui/tui-launch.test.ts`
- `git diff --check -- src/tui/tui-types.ts src/tui/tui.ts src/cli/tui-cli.ts src/tui/tui.test.ts src/tui/tui-command-handlers.test.ts src/cli/program.smoke.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.core.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core.tsbuildinfo`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: `/exit` in the standalone TUI can no longer leave the onboarding-launched `openclaw-tui` child alive after the UI stops.
Real environment tested: Local macOS source worktree; focused TUI/CLI test coverage against this patched branch.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/tui/tui.test.ts src/tui/tui-command-handlers.test.ts src/cli/program.smoke.test.ts src/tui/tui-launch.test.ts`; `git diff --check -- src/tui/tui-types.ts src/tui/tui.ts src/cli/tui-cli.ts src/tui/tui.test.ts src/tui/tui-command-handlers.test.ts src/cli/program.smoke.test.ts`; `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.core.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core.tsbuildinfo`; `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`.
Evidence after fix: The `/exit` command path calls `requestExit` without sending through the gateway, and the standalone CLI TUI now passes `forceProcessExitOnReturn` so lingering runtime handles get a bounded post-return exit guard.
Observed result after fix: Focused TUI/CLI tests passed, diff whitespace check passed, core tsgo passed, and autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings.
What was not tested: Manual interactive onboarding `/exit` replay was not rerun against a packaged build; the already-hung PID was not killed by this patch.
target.author: fuller-stack-dev
